    (hf_bdd : ∃ (M : ℝ), ∀ z ∈ Set.Icc 0 z_F, f z ≤ M) (B_0 : ℝ)
    (hB_0 : B_0 = sSup (Set.range fun z : ℝ => ((z_F - z) * ∫ x in Set.Icc 0 z, 1 / D x) ^ (1 / 2)))
    (hB_0_fin : B_0 < infty) (C_p : ℝ) (hC_p : C_p < 2 * B_0) :
    (∀ z ∈ Set.Icc 0 z_F, DifferentiableAt ℝ u z) →
    (∀ z ∈ Set.Icc 0 z_F, deriv u z = deriv u z) →
    (∀ z ∈ Set.Icc 0 z_F, u z = ∫ x in Set.Icc 0 z, deriv u x) →
    ∫ z in Set.Icc 0 z_F, u z ^ 2 ≤ C_p ^ 2 * ∫ z in Set.Icc 0 z_F, (deriv u z) ^ 2 * D z ∧
    ∫ z in Set.Icc 0 z_F, f z * u z ^ 2 ≤ (Classical.choose hf_bdd) * ∫ z in Set.Icc 0 z_F, u z ^ 2 ∧
    ∫ z in Set.Icc 0 z_F, f z * u z ^ 2 ≤ (Classical.choose hf_bdd) * C_p ^ 2 * ∫ z in Set.Icc 0 z_F, (deriv u z) ^ 2 * D z
